violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . No sanitizer was detected in Dishwasher during Inspection.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor in Cooking area were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
